summary: review create-update now flattens the stdin JSON map into review[...] bracket-key form fields and POSTs application/x-www-form-urlencoded via PostFormWithParams, instead of sending a JSON body.
reason: Greptile P1: the legacy Rails controller at POST /review/update/:book_id only accepts application/x-www-form-urlencoded; the JSON body sent via PostWithParams was silently ignored and nothing updated.
validated_outcome: Against a local echo server the command sends Content-Type application/x-www-form-urlencoded with body authenticity_token=...&review%5Bnotes%5D=...&review%5Breview%5D=... to POST /review/update/12345.
